title: Highly Detailed Portrait Young Woman Fair Skin
sourceTitle: Highly Detailed Portrait Young Woman Fair Skin
prompt: A highly detailed portrait of a young woman with fair skin, striking blue eyes, and long straight reddish-orange hair styled in a sleek high ponytail with some strands framing her face, standing confidently in a modern indoor setting with dark minimalist walls. She has a poised expression looking directly at the viewer, wearing elegant gold jewelry including large hoop earrings, a thick ornate gold chain necklace, and a prominent gold ring on her right hand. Her outfit is a form-fitting black long-sleeved high-neck jumpsuit made of smooth stretch fabric, with the top featuring subtle seam details and the pants showing a seamless fitted silhouette. Her right hand is raised gracefully touching her ponytail, while her left arm rests naturally by her side. Professional studio lighting with soft highlights accentuating her features and the outfit's texture, captured in a realistic high-resolution photographic style.
